scripts.build:family: npm run build -w @apps/family && npm run cap:sync -w @apps/family
scripts.build:guard: npm run build -w @apps/guard && npm run cap:sync -w @apps/guard
scripts.build: npm run build:family && npm run build:guard
scripts.android:family: npm run build:family && node scripts/android-build.mjs family assembleRelease
scripts.android:guard: npm run build:guard && node scripts/android-build.mjs guard assembleRelease
scripts.android:family:debug: npm run build:family && node scripts/android-build.mjs family assembleDebug
scripts.android:guard:debug: npm run build:guard && node scripts/android-build.mjs guard assembleDebug
scripts.ios:family: npm run build:family && npm run cap:open:ios -w @apps/family
scripts.ios:guard: npm run build:guard && npm run cap:open:ios -w @apps/guard
scripts.test: npm run test:family && npm run test:guard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @apps/family && npm run typecheck -w @apps/guard
